title: Inline text — emphasis and code spans
description: Bold, italic, underline, strikethrough, highlight, and InlineCode spans inside React typography.

og.title: Typography · Inline · Zentauri UI
og.description: Bold, italic, underline, strikethrough, highlight, and InlineCode spans inside React typography.

twitter.title: Typography · Inline · Zentauri UI
twitter.description: Bold, italic, underline, strikethrough, highlight, and InlineCode spans inside React typography.

intro: Compose InlineCode for monospace tokens and Text toggles for semantic emphasis patterns inside paragraphs.

faqs.question: Should InlineCode wrap keyboard keys?
faqs.answer: Yes for monospace clarity; pair with Text emphasis when describing shortcuts.

faqs.question: Can InlineCode sit inside buttons?
faqs.answer: Technically yes, but prefer plain spans inside buttons unless monospace is required.

faqs.question: Does destructive tone imply errors?
faqs.answer: It applies rose text styling—reserve for risky actions or validation messaging.

sections.heading: What it does
sections.body:
Demonstrates emphasis combinations on Text and monospace InlineCode surfaces.

Tones align with the broader typography palette.

sections.heading: Composition and API
sections.body:
Nest InlineCode inside Text or headings sparingly.

Avoid deeply nested emphasis toggles.

sections.heading: Accessibility
sections.body:
Underline complements links elsewhere—avoid conflicting patterns.

Highlight should not be the only cue.

sections.heading: Next.js integration notes
sections.body:
Static docs can ship Inline-heavy paragraphs from MDX.

Ensure code tokens escape user-provided strings.
